entry.title: Re: SAP Integration suite
entry.content: with the servers... what servers? Web socket communication for what purpose?

entry.title: Re: Scrolling table control in module pool goes to next tab
entry.content: Solution - go to config table V_T133D (SM30) and populate checkbox field SLBKZ (Indicator: Process same screen again) for the record containing the "Local Screen" field value, "Successor Screen" value, and the function code in question.  Apparently SAP uses the record containing local screen, successor screen, and FCODE value to control auto-navigation.

entry.title: Installation of equipment to functional location via maintenance order possibility
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a request if there is a possibility to perform an installation of equipment to functional location via corrective maintenance order? 

There is an equipment created with assigned serialized material and successful installation can be performed with IE4N or the respective Fiori app, however i`m trying to perform it via corrective maintenance order and looking for relevant information for it. 

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally
entry.content: you can see the msg is different, this time it says the token is invalid. did you debug and see what you have for csrf_token?

entry.title: subcontracting BOM components in PO do not generate requirements
entry.content:
hello all

my scenario is the following:

I created a PO with several items, one of which is a subcontracting configurable item with its BOM components that must be shipped to the supplier.

configuration is correct and the list of components of the BOM appear in the material tab.

my problem is the following:

in MD04 I can see the subcontracting line for the components but even if the system sees that the component is needed (to be shipped to the supplier), it does not generate any requirement such as Preq or planned order.

in attachment an example: I can see the subcontracting line, there is no available stock but the requirement is not generated

entry.title: Re: CDS for Public Cloud with material, serial numbers, a...
entry.content:
Hi,

CDS view I_SerialNumberStockSegment contains stock information, like plant or storage location, per material/serial number combination: https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_SERIALNUMBERSTOCKSEGMENT

I hope this fulfills your requirement.

BR,
Alex

entry.title: Re: Error "Serial number already exists for material" whe...
entry.content: Did you already look at KBA such as 3382949 - Error IS121 "Serial number &1 already exists for material &2" at goods movement posting ?

entry.title: Re: Subcontratação Brasil
entry.content: Olá! Estamos no processo de implantação do SAP na cooperativa em que trabalho. Temos um processo de prestação de serviço para recapagem de pneus e queremos utilizar a subcontratação para atende-lo, e precisamos passar para o fornecedor um formato adequado de NF para ele usar como modelo, hoje em dia a prestação chega com valor do serviço separado dos materiais (mandei em anexo um exemplo), alguém consegue me ajudar a formular uma NF que se adeque ao processo utilizando as informações dessa que recebemos atualmente?

entry.title: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need to be deleted in batch. How can I do this?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I store the PERNRs in an internal table and loop through it.  This is in a test environment, not Production.

Step 1:  I use fm HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA to set to clear out PA0003-ABRDT, and this works fine.

Step 2:  I need to run Submit RPUDEL20 to delete the payroll results.  How do I code this to suppress the screens, and can I check whether it was successful?  my SUBMIT statement is as follows:

      ls_seltab-selname = 'PNPPERNR'.
      ls_seltab-kind    = 'S'.
      ls_seltab-sign    = 'I'.
      ls_seltab-option  = 'EQ'.
      ls_seltab-low     = lv_pernr.
      CLEAR ls_seltab-high.
      APPEND ls_seltab TO lt_seltab.

  SUBMIT rpudel20 WITH SELECTION-TABLE lt_seltab
    AND RETURN
    EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY.

Step 3:  CALL TRANSACTION pu00 to delete the PERNR.  This doesn't work because step 2 fails.

Please help.

Thanks,
Dan

entry.title: Re: [EWM] Picking from bulk storage - Pick Point
entry.content: Hi @lauinator, I do not know what you are meaning bulk (Pick point can not set if bulk in Storage type) however see work around in SAP OSS... 2496895 - Available quantity level is not supported at storage bin and pick point

entry.title: Re: Error "Serial number already exists for material" whe...
entry.content:
Hello Raymond,

Yes i did, in my scenario the GR is successful and i have received it with the external serial number. 

I`m trying to create a new equipment after the material is received with the respective external SN, which should not be changed.

entry.title: how to change document status e0018 to text
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I want change user status of change document for technical status to text logs its showing e0018 to Authorized for Production

entry.title: Access event log, case attributes via API to perform ML based predictions
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am looking for options to access Business objects, event log created within Process Intelligence. I would require to access this data to perform ML based predictions or employ other AI based applications.  

The idea is to perform all these computations in external notebook and push this data back to Process Intelligence so that we can show predictions or any other applications.

Has anyone worked on this kind of setup, how to access data from Process Intelligence and push it back to the model. Any kind of API provided or Python based setup available, please advise.

@Process Intelligence @SAP Signavio

entry.title: Re: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277
entry.content:
It depends on your exact version, look in Syste, List menu

or

entry.title: Recruiting applicant status categories (employee category)
entry.content:
Hello everyboy,

I have been looking for information on how categories work in the applicant status, but found almost nothing abaout it. I have a case where the customer wants to close the requisition when it gets to a status but i cant use neither onaboard, hired or pre-start categories. I wonder if the employee category would do the trick, maily considering that the customer wants to move people who are internal candidates just applying for new positions. Its an internal move. It seems to me that the "employe" category would be the right one for this, but I wanted some documentation on that or information to know if there is ANY OTHER impact than closing the requisition.

 

Regards


Ricardo

entry.title: Re: Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing &
entry.content: I'm having the same problem. Out of seemly no-where I don't have access anymore.

entry.title: Re: Deployment Scheduling in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Moritz

Is it foreseen to have an automatic status change on the feature based on successful import?
Means: In case a scheduled import ran, that the features considered in that import schedule are set to status "deployed" automatically.

Thanks and BR

Thomas

entry.title: Make a component attribute optional in Child Component in SmartEdit
entry.content:
I have a component that inherits from CMSLinkComponent. I want to make the contentPage, url, category and Product attributes optional in SmartEdit. I tried this code:

<bean class="de.hybris.platform.cmsfacades.types.service.impl.DefaultComponentTypeAttributeStructure" p:typecode="MyCMSLinkComponent" p:qualifier="url">
    <property name="populators">
        <set>
            <ref bean="unRequiredComponentTypeAttributePopulator" />
        </set>
    </property>
</bean>

But it doesn't work. It seems that the CMS Structure API only works on attributes assigned directly to this component and not to the parent component.

entry.title: HCM Payroll PCR Attendance Bonus
entry.content:
The client wants to pay an attendance bonus based on the following conditions:

If an employee is present for the entire month – ₹1500.
If an employee takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee takes two days of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month – ₹1500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee joins on the second day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes more than one day of leave – ₹0.
I have tried handling this through a PCR, but it is not considering employees who joined on the second day of the month.

How can I resolve this issue? Please suggest a solution

entry.title: Re: Error "Serial number already exists for material" whe...
entry.content: Consider also creating a new internal serial number but keep the external one in Manufacturer Serial Number

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally
entry.content:
Yes, I've added a change for getting csrf token before POST.

Now csrf token looks like mLAE-tt3ksLjb0DPUUK8Yw== and I push it to POST request, but getting 403 error.

entry.title: Future Proofing Your Data Strategy: Unlocking the Power of AI to Drive Business Innovation - Part 1
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, data has become a strategic asset and the lifeblood of modern enterprises. The ability to harness and leverage data effectively can mean the difference between thriving and merely surviving. With the rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI), the importance of a robust data strategy has never been greater.

Organizations wanting to adopt AI must treat data investment as a strategic initiative. This involves creating a data strategy that aligns with business goals while leveraging the latest technologies to unlock the full potential of their data assets. When managing organization’s data across disparate data solutions, the data teams struggle with maintaining the business context, data quality and trust in the data. In an SAP survey of 1200 IT and Business leaders in the second half of 2024, only 34% business leaders report high trust in their data capabilities and 55% state that Data Quality remains their Number 1 challenge. (see figure 1)

Trust in data doesn’t happen by accident—it’s built through strong governance frameworks that help ensure data is accurate, consistent, and actionable. Without governance, organizations risk poor decisions, fragmented insights, and a lack of confidence in data systems. Our survey and interviews highlight governance as a critical factor in closing the trust gap and enabling data-oriented success.

 

Figure 1 - SAP Survey Results - 2H 2024

Recognizing this need, SAP introduced the SAP Business Data Cloud, a solution offering designed to unify all SAP and third-party data within an organization in once place for both Analytics and AI use cases. It provides a trusted data foundation and the tools necessary to make impactful decisions while fostering reliable AI. By integrating SAP Datasphere, SAP Analytics Cloud, SAP Databricks and SAP Business Warehouse into a unified experience, SAP Business Data Cloud delivers actionable insights across all lines of business.

The Need for a Future Ready Data Strategy in the Age of AI 

The demand for AI and advanced analytics has underscored the critical need for a future ready AI first data strategy. AI’s growing influence is evident in the implementation of AI agents—intelligent systems that learn, make decisions, and execute actions on behalf of humans. McKinsey & Company refers to this concept as “superagency,” describing it as potentially transformative as the steam engine during the Industrial Revolution.

According to McKinsey’s January 2025 report, superagency represents the enhanced capabilities achieved through human-AI collaboration. By leveraging AI tools, individuals can amplify creativity, productivity, and decision-making, creating a partnership that elevates human and machine potential. However, this transformation heavily relies on accessible, integrated, and high-quality data.

Traditional data strategies, often characterized by multiple data solutions pieced together, creating silos and limiting AI’s ability to function across the business context. Legacy data systems may also struggle to handle the volume and velocity required by AI. Without a Future Ready data strategy, AI tools risk becoming costly, underperforming investments, unable to deliver the return on investment (ROI) they promise. A Future Ready data strategy bridges the gap between AI’s potential and an organization’s readiness, transforming raw data into a trustworthy, scalable asset that empowers leaders and employees alike.

Advantages of a Robust Future Data Strategy 

In addition to ensuring accurate, reliable, and trustworthy data outcomes essential for successful AI implementation, a Future Ready data strategy offers numerous advantages that can help and accelerate the transformation of an organization by focusing on:

  • Access to trusted accurate and timely data insights enables better-informed decisions. 
  • Streamlining processes to enhance operational efficiency across different data roles
  • Minimizes data redundancy lowering the risk of data breaches leading to significant cost savings.
  • Reveals market trends and customer needs that can foster a culture of continuous innovation.
  • Avoids legal issues and penalties through adherence to data protection regulations
  • protects sensitive information, building trust with robust security measures.

Current Trends in Data Architecture Frameworks 

As data continues to grow in both volume and complexity, organizations must adopt modern data architecture frameworks to address these challenges effectively.

The Trends include:

  • Data Fabric: A unified architecture that ensures consistent data management across various storage types. 
  • Data Mesh: A decentralized approach that empowers individual business domains to own and manage their data as products. 
  • Data Products: Tools or solutions designed to provide end users with actionable insights for decision-making.

SAP Business Data Cloud: The Solution 

SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) addresses the challenges of legacy data architectures, enabling organizations to unlock the full potential of their data assets (See figure 2). As a fully managed SaaS solution by SAP, it unifies and governs all SAP data while seamlessly integrating with third-party data sources. This empowers business leaders to make impactful decisions with contextual insights.

Key features of SAP Business Data Cloud include: 

  • Mission-Critical Data Products - Access to all SAP data across critical business processes in a deeply contextual manner. 
  • Seamless Integration - Native capabilities to connect SAP and third-party data, including integration with Databricks. 
  • Insight Apps - Prebuilt applications that deliver specific insights for advanced analytics and planning across all business lines. 
  • Trusted Data Foundation - A reliable foundation for production-ready AI that ensures data is accurate, responsible, and relevant. 

By providing tools for creating AI models and generative AI applications trained on business data, SAP Business Data Cloud fosters reliable AI. Its trusted data layer ensures AI agents can access all organizational data, while the SAP Knowledge Graph connects data, metadata, and business processes. This contextual connection enables AI agents to ground their decisions in the original business context, ensuring accuracy and relevance.

Figure 2 - SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC)

Modernizing SAP Business Warehouse with SAP Business Data Cloud 

For organizations currently using SAP Business Warehouse (BW), SAP Business Data Cloud offers a clear path forward. It provides an economical route to cloud modernization while preserving existing BW capabilities. By leveraging Business Data Cloud, organizations can maximize their BW data as data products, take advantage of advanced AI capabilities, and modernize their infrastructure. Native integration with SAP BW simplifies the transition to the cloud, ensuring customers can maximize their SAP investments.

Conclusion 

According to McKinsey, only 1% of leaders consider their organizations to be AI-mature. Barriers such as talent shortages, ethical considerations, infrastructure challenges, and fragmented data limit AI adoption. Among these, data quality and integration stand out as critical success factors.

Fragmented, low-quality data trapped in silos undermines AI’s ability to deliver actionable insights and closed-loop actions. A robust data strategy, supported by solutions like SAP Business Data Cloud, can overcome these challenges. It not only lays the foundation for future AI applications but also delivers immediate value by providing insights that surprise and delight business users.

By making their data strategies future ready, organizations can unlock the full potential of AI, driving innovation and achieving sustainable growth.

A big shout out to the Co-Authors: @jasonluo @ManjunathGudisi. Thank you!

 

SAP Business Data Cloud  SAP Analytics Cloud BW (SAP Business Warehouse)

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm from Poland, happy to join the SAP Community!

entry.title: DOMESTIC AND INTERNATIONAL CROSSBOARDING PROCESS DESIGN FOR A GLOBAL CLIENT
entry.content:
DOMESTIC AND INTERNATIONAL CROSSBOARDING PROCESS Design FOR A GLOBAL CLIENT

OVERVIEW:

We had a business requirement to allow crossboarding to trigger for both domestic and international transfers, when employee applied on a job through recruiting ONLY.

When an employee transitions to a new role within the same country, it was simple to design domestic crossboarding process with consistent configuration for job and employment information.

One of the challenges of international transfers was that each country has its own job and employment information field level configurations.

When a legal entity changes for international transfers, SAP advises terminating the record and starting a new hiring process; however, our client followed another process. Employees were transferred from one country to another, without terminating their existing records.

Initiating Legal Entity Transfer from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting | SAP Help Portal

Additionally, business did not provide clear event reason information that would initiate the crossboarding process for domestic and international transfers.

With this approach, we were also able to restrict the crossboarding trigger to only from recruiting ONLY, excluding changes from Employee Central. This aligns with one of the key requirements to limit the trigger point that we get to hear from many customers.

 

Explanation of business scenario:

Domestic Transfers – When a domestic employee moves to a different position/role within the same country, business wanted only minimum personal data review and validation procedures. From business perspective since the employees were local, it would be pointless to gather compliance data and additional onboarding paperwork particular to the country.     

International transfers – For international transfers when an employee was relocating abroad, business wanted employees to review/update their basic personal information, provide additional country-specific onboarding documentation, e-sign company-specific documents, and complete compliance paperwork. 

         

 

 

 

 With all the above scenario in place we did the below configuration to meet the business requirement.

 Configuration Steps:

  • Create two distinct event reasons specifically for the purpose of Domestic and International transfers cases

 

  • To prevent any kind of manual selection, created a business rule that will automatically select the correct event cause on job applications. This was a crucial step in preventing the initiation of an incorrect process variant an incorrect onboarding/crossboarding (Domestic or International) process.

 

  • Create different process variants, one for domestic and one for internation transfers cases

  Domestic Crossboarding Process

 International Crossboarding Process

 

 

 

  • With the help of business rule default, the correct process variant with the condition of event reason selected on job application

 

 

 

  • Created a Crossboarding trigger rule with the condition of event reason selected on job application

 

  • Set up position to job info synchronization business rule. This business rule is needed because of following below reason.

Data Consistency: This business rule ensures that the position data in SuccessFactors (SF) is consistent with the job information data. Crossboarding typically involves transferring an employee from one job or position to another. Without synchronization, discrepancies could occur, leading to mismatches in roles, responsibilities, or other vital position-related details.

 

Efficient Onboarding and Transitions: Crossboarding involves transitioning an employee from one position or location to another. By setting up synchronization between the position and job information, the system automatically updates the employee's job details, including job title, location, and department. This streamlines the process and ensures that everything is up to date for the new role without manual intervention.

 

Automation: The rule automates updates, reducing the need for manual input when a position or job changes. This minimizes human error, saves time, and ensures a smoother, more efficient transition between roles.

 

 

The remaining configuration is the same as for any other crossboarding process; we won't go into great depth because we have reference documents readily available for below steps.

  • Setting Up a Rule for Selecting the Onboarding Program
  • Permission Role for Future Manager
  • Business rule to Initiate Internal Hire Process.
  • Setting up Email Services
  • Recruit to Hire mapping.
  • Create multiple UI to get triggered to collect documents for international transfer cased for different countries via business rule.  

 

 Lesson Learned and Challenges faced:

  • To prevent the creation of position to job information sync business rules, SAP recently developed a few features (Enable Additional Internal Hire Activities). When this functionality was activated after SAP's release, we were able to initiate the crossboarding process without seeing any error messages in the BPE tile. Additionally, the job information portal was not updated with the new values we wanted to send from recruitment for new position/role. SAP's stated functionality did not assist in fulfilling our business needs. We tried using the feature as soon as it became available in their release.
  • We also noticed that I-9 compliance forms were not being triggered in international transfer cases. After much collaboration with SAP, they recommended a solution to manually trigger I-9 compliance for situations involving overseas transfers from non-US to US scenario. This issue was only with I-9 compliance forms; all other compliance forms for all countries were properly triggered for all international transfer cases.
  • Considering all the challenges we faced; SAP provides a standard process based on industry best practices and proven methodologies. Adhering to this process ensures that the Crossboarding workflow is implemented in a way that is both efficient and effective. By following the suggested process, companies avoid reinventing the wheel and benefit from SAP's expertise in designing optimized, scalable solutions.

entry.title: Re: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need...
entry.content:
First read 2927142 - Bulk or massive deletion of payroll results as this report should only be used in quality and development systems (test system should be ok)

  • Have you considered batch input on PU01 as you do for PU00 as SUBMIT does not usually allow to get error message when calling transaction do, of course PU01 may raise some errors that the report would ignore.
  • Did you consider a Z-transaction to wrap RPUDEL20 ?

entry.title: Re: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply, Raymond. I am trying to do this in quality system, no production. I have tried to use BDC with PU01 with no success. Our consultant suggested that RPUDEL20 is a better option.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database Explorer (Synonym issue)
entry.content: @KALYANI_HEDAOO  Did you resolve the issue ? I am having a same issue.

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content: Some critical info is missing in this blog. The time slice only supports FI/CO transformation objects. No way to change the time slice on a transformation object ... as far as I can find in the documentation. No HCM on time slice but we have a huge amount on data in HCM. We aren't moving pay and time to SuccessFactors. Any plan to include HCM to time slice?

entry.title: Re: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need...
entry.content: So try Z-transaction to get error messages back

entry.title: Re: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need...
entry.content: I have never wrapped a standard SAP program into a Z-transaction. Can you please provide some guidance?

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content:
Hi jpriya

Please check the help link - per the help, the Item BAdI would be triggered:

"You can use this BAdI to modify a changed or newly created item. You can also change delivery document header fields. This BAdI is called after one or more items have been changed or newly created."

Per your workflow, you are only changing the header, you are not changing or adding any items. But I think simply adding the form is not enough of a change to trigger the doc prepare BAdI. I am actually a little surprised it triggered the Header BAdI. 

Could you try to make a change to the Item - for example, edit the description of one of the items. Note that Quantity change might not trigger the BAdI at the item level. - please confirm this with your testing.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: No data was released for version Y10 and Consolidation Unit - SAP Group Reporting
entry.content: Hello Allam, I have done the realingment of grpl but still have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: Getting Grips on your Cloud Integration Migration from Neo to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi Willem,

Thanks for the blog. This is really useful app. 

I was able to set the app and now trying to download the content from Neo. It downloaded the integration content but got errored out while downloading keystore entries. I retried multiple times but gets stuck at this point. Appreciate any insights to resolve this error.

entry.title: Product compliance events and integration
entry.content:
WE have requirement to send product compliance data (like compositions / substance etc) to third party systems. Looking for standard out of box (without custom development) to send this data to third party systems. 

We noticed that certain events are triggered (substance save) 

Product Compliance Events and Tasks | SAP Help Portal

 SPRO -> Product compliance Background processing -> Activate event linkage (can we leverage this)? 

Can we send this events to event mesh? if we need to send this information to third party applications, How do we go about doing this?

or do we leverage the following configuration SPRO for production compliance (SPRO -> Product compliance -> Integration -> specify communication settings for integration into External systems)?

entry.title: Re: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Posi...
entry.content:
Hey @Former_Sap20 ,

Not sure this will work as per your requirement exactly but here is what I am thinking

If you don't need the matrix relationships at all then Could you please try changing the visibility of the matrixRelationshipType and relatedPosition to not visibile in the PositionMatrixRelationship object and then try creating the new position.

While creating the position, start filling the details of the position object then you will see a delete option in the matrix relationship section like below (make sure you have full permissions). Clicking on delete button will let you create a new position as required with out matrix relationship info. I dont know the dominal effects because of this change but just wanted to put this thought out.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition : Secure Cloud Connectivity
entry.content:
@Jana_Cyber , thanks for the blog.

Do we also have official IPSEC bandwidth information for Customers hosted on SAP-DC?
I am looking for information specifically for a customer who is in the datacenter "CS2: USA: Colorado Springs, CO". But I believe that the bandwidth information is general for SAP-DC.

entry.title: Re: I have a z-table that has a list of PERNRs that need...
entry.content: As RPUDEL20 is a report (selection screen), simply call SE93, create a Z<yourcode> transaction of type 'report transaction' and provide the report name on the next screen, provide a customer package and transport request.

entry.title: Re: Disable popup dialog when I am going to create a new...
entry.content: Hi Devs, do you know if there is a setting what we can apply for RAP backends to achieve the same? Scenario OData v4 draft enabled. Beside the managed numbering we have other UUID fields which results in showing the dialog, but the goal is to supress it. In V2 w/o draft the behavior is opposite, you need to explicitly specify in manifest.json the setting "createWithParameterDialog".Thank You!

entry.title: Re: How to Assign Ressource to the Project
entry.content:
For PS Projects look here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4dd8cb7b1c484b4b93af84d00f60fdb8/2dc4b65334e6b54ce10000000a174cb4.html

For PPM Projects look here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/db719753e69f4e8eb9902aaea0fd8471/4ad36f4f95e434c6e10000000a421138.html

You also use HELP.SAP.COM to see the difference between the 2 project management solutions.

entry.title: Re: Contribution View for Nutrients in SAP PLM Recipe Development
entry.content: Hi Abdul, Can you share the screenshot of the Calculation Results --> Nutrients tab? Also, reading your query, I think there is a typo; I think you meant that the nutrients are showing on the Calculation results --> Nutrients tab but not on the Contribution tab. Also, can you confirm if you have Nutrient data maintained in the "Nutrient Composition" or "Hierarchical Nutrient Composition"?

entry.title: Re: #COE#TAIT How to download data from Monitor value cha...
entry.content:
Hi Christy_2

I now understand you want to download the document itself and all the follow on documents (Delivery, Billing, Material movement, etc ) - is this correct?

I think think is not possible from this app. However, you can click the right arrow on the line of the document you can drill down to all the subsequent documents. In that view, you can observe which ones have the errors and then process them directly.

Alternatively, you can click on the document number itself and configure the link list to drive into the associate app.

Could you help us understand what you want to do by downloading the document and all the subsequent docs? and what would be the expected format? (PDF?)

For example, if I look in my list, for the first doc (sales order), I see 12 follow on documents. 

What would you do with those 13 docs after you download them? I would expect you would need to go back into the system to actually reprocess / correct them.

With this in mind, the designers likely thought you would want to handle the list directly in the system.

But if you could comment with your workflow / use case, perhaps someone else here would have another idea.

I could imagine you could investigate developer or side by side extensibility (a side by side custom application for example) to facilitate downloading the docs via public api, but that would be a development effort from your side.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Business Meets Football: Insights from an Inspiring Discussion
entry.content:
Great concept, Verena - thank you for sharing it!

One parallel I've come to realize in recent years is that being a part of a productive and healthy team means that WE ARE NEVER ALONE. We may feel like certain tasks/initiatives are our alone and that we must figure them out on our own but that is not the case. Consult with your 'team mates', get other perspectives, let them help you! Most people are more than willing to take a look and give feedback. That support can mean the difference between delivering and not delivering so when you get stuck or just want another set of eyes/ears turn to your team!

entry.title: Automatic Good Receipt for Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

Currently, our users have to manually process goods receipts for purchase orders, which is both time-consuming and prone to errors when identifying each item accurately and posting the receipt.

Application used - Post Good Receipt for Purchasing Document

Is there an application that allows us to upload the relevant goods receipt information for the system to process automatically? Alternatively, is there an API available to achieve this?

Your advice is highly appreciated.

Many thanks,

Monali

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA 2023 Variant missing for ERP Readiness check in ATC System
entry.content: Hello, PLease refer SAP Note 2436688 - Recommended SAP Notes for Using S/4HANA Custom Code Checks in ATC or Custom Code Migration App

entry.title: Using Umlaute and special Characters in an htm email template
entry.content:
After creating an html email template into SAP Business ByDesign you realize that Umlaute i.e.

Ö, Ä Ü and

 ä, ö, ü 

are not shown correctly.

same for chinese character.

 

This usually happens while template creation.

 

A good way is to create an html template in MS Word and us "save as" with the correct file extension Web Page (htm, html).

entry.title: Re: Adding People Profile link in Forms
entry.content: Does this also work after latest people profile roll out? will the block id's remain?

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hello,

Will customers still have the ability to opt-out in 1H 2025? Or will this become universal?

entry.title: Time Variance not working for period comparison in SAC for month on month comparison on live connec
entry.content:
Time Hierarchy

  • Time Variance not working for period comparison in SAC in live conenction ? I found few article but they were not so useful, and there is very few documentation on this topic. Any support will be much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
Lorie, you've had a great SAP career already. I also got involved with SAP in the late 90s at a customer when I learned as a user MM. Be sure to join the many Interest Groups | SAP Community

Your engagement with end users about your areas of expertise is fantastic as well. Together we can learn and be better! Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Posi...
entry.content:
Hi Surya, Thank you for your response.

But this is exactly what I did. While trying to set those two fields, relatedPosition and matrixRelationshipType, as non-mandatory in the object PositionMatrixRelationship, this error was triggered:

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: MDK - how to expose data as simple table on a phone w...
entry.content:
As you mentioned, data paging for a data table has limitations.  As this functionality is currently not available in the MDK standard control, I would suggest you to open a feature request here. We'll review it based on its priority.

Have you considered using an Object Table instead of a data table?  Data Table/Grid Views don't generally render well on a phone due to the limited space and an Object Table often makes a better experience.  I would recommend looking at that first.  It does support paging and you have many fields where you can include your 5 columns of data.

entry.title: “With ‘Joule for Developers’ We Have a Treasure in Our Hands”
entry.content:
Sonja Liénard, head of SAP BTP ABAP, has a long history in ABAP development and has held various roles at SAP. She has worked on the ABAP database interface, the ABAP Kernel, and ABAP Developer Tools.

Her teams are working all-out to ensure that the new capability in SAP Build released this week for general use by customers and partners – Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities (known internally as “Joule for ABAP”) – is continually tested and enhanced. In this Q&A, Sonja gives SAP News a look at the new capability and talks about its impact for both developers and SAP. 

SAP News: More than 7,000 ABAP developers at SAP have been testing the AI extensions for over three months now, along with 120 people from 13 pilot customers and partners. What does the support from Joule look like and what feedback have you received?

Sonja: The feedback has been very positive. Joule for developers can answer questions about programming, explain code, suggest code auto-completion, and perform unit tests. [See the box at the end of the article for explanations.]

Our more than 150 developers from a variety of departments who took part in our initial beta test rated satisfaction levels from 70% to more than 80% in all of these areas. The new AI features make their work much easier. As such, we are seeing very high recommendation rates.

The feedback from our customers and partners was even more positive: they are eager to start using the tools in their systems on an everyday basis. The many inquiries about additional use cases that we have received show us that our customers and partners are using Joule for developers intensively and have very high expectations of it.

Where isn’t the AI working satisfactorily yet? What needs to be improved?

We’re talking about an initial delivery – so it’s completely normal that we’re working on ongoing improvements. In particular, the predictive code completion was missing a key improvement during the test phase, but now has it. Our experts and data scientists worked all-out to achieve that. And the AI models are being trained on specific use cases so they can deliver the best results.

It’s also important to remember that Joule can’t read minds. The quality of the proposed code depends on how completely and accurately the developers specify their requirements. Without sufficient comments or specifications, the results will never be perfect – just like with other AI use cases.

We announced general availability of AI support for developers this week. Why is AI support for ABAP developers so important for SAP from a strategic perspective?

There are several reasons. First of all, because the market has been waiting for Joule for developers for quite a long time and there’s a lot of demand. It can significantly boost efficiency in development, along with user satisfaction.

Secondly, our model is unique because it’s based on millions of lines of ABAP code that only SAP has. So, we have something really valuable here! This model is truly one of a kind in this form.

Last but not least, Joule for developers will help SAP achieve its strategic goals, especially with regard to cloud strategy and increasing cloud revenue. A true ace up our sleeve, indeed.

What are the next steps? Is there anything else you’d like to say to our developers?

After general availability (GA), the next important step is the enhancement of the custom code migration tools with AI support. We’ve put together a dedicated team to concentrate on training the model for this migration, and it aims to truly transform from classic ABAP to ABAP Cloud.

This is a groundbreaking approach because it simplifies and accelerates custom code migration – that is, the transformation from classic ABAP, some of it developed or modified directly by our customers, into ABAP Cloud. This step supports RISE with SAP, for instance, as well as the general adoption of our cloud portfolio, and contributes directly to meeting SAP’s cloud revenue targets. It’s a real treasure!

And to the developers: if you’re not working with the tool yet, give it a try! We’re sure that it won’t just be a big help; it’ll be a lot of fun, too. Find out about innovations and info sessions. We’d be happy to get your feedback.
@lienards 
_____________________

This is how Joule for developers supports you: 

  • Chat lets developers interact directly with the tool, similar to Google and Copilot, to ask questions and get support for coding. 
  • Explain helps developers understand the existing code and development objects by giving them explanations of selected coding. 
  • Predictive code completion suggests lines of code for potential implementation, based on comments and the previously entered specifications. Developers can accept or reject this ghost text.
  • Unit test generation automates the generation of unit tests for ABAP classes and core data services and helps improve them, helping developers make sure that the code functions properly. 

    This interview was first published at SAP One, SAP's employee portal.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content:
@Omarjeldrs your commitment shows for learning. It would be great if you could share your learning journey in the community for others to try and emulate. As an idea you could share Career Corner - SAP Community and share in your social media to get others engaged.

One idea for you is to join or create a local SAP chapter - Location Groups | SAP Community

@lauraschmitz getting you in the loop for suggestions. 

Best of luck.

entry.title: Re: Unable to access "SAP Business Application Studio" after using it few days, throwing &
entry.content: I just fixed the same error. Check in the Security > Trust Configuration > Default identity provider. Edit it and check whether the Available for User Logon checkbox is checked. Mine was not checked and changing that seemed to fix the error.

entry.title: SAC drill down or Hierarchies function for product dimesion LIVE connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I have one question, how can we use CDS Hierarchies for example to drill down on Dimensions? for example how to create level based  like  Region-Country-City drildown or like ( Year>Quarter>Month) 'Level based Hierarchy ?

I want to craete level based Hierarchies for  The field Product Hierarchy (MARA-PRDHA). I am working on LIVE connection. 

Any support would be appreciated.

I saw few articles, buit did not found the excat solution

I am attaching few links below for your reference, 

Hierarchies in CDS views - SAP Community

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-cds-recursive-association-using-hierarchy/ba-p/13455674

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/ABENCDS_F1_DEFINE_HIERARCHY.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/beginners-guide-for-cds-hierarchies-part-2/ba-p/13473914

 

SAC output should have drilldown on dimensions like below to represent each category or level separately and user should have choice to see level. Similarly like we have for Date (to see it on year month day)

entry.title: Update of tax classification using BAPI_MATERIAL_MAINTAINDATA_RT - only partly updated.
entry.content:
I have a program that uses BAPI_MATERIAL_MAINTAINDATA_RT to update tax classification.

The problem is that the tax class (MARA-TAKLV) is not updated in General tab in MM43, but if pressing button "Tax Data" next to the field the value (MG03STEUER-TAXKM) is updated there for SE (Sweden) KSCHL = MWST.

The tax code change is due to a switch from one merchandise category to another and the tax code should be changed to the same as reference article have on the merchandise category the article is moved to.

 

 

  CLEAR: as_tax, at_tax.

  "Read mara-taklv from reference article.
  DATA(lv_ref_art) = zcl_mdam_lsd_mara=>get_ref( iv_matkl = p_nmatkl ).
  DATA(lv_taklv) = zcl_mdam_lsd_mara=>get( lv_ref_art )-taklv.

  CLEAR as_headdata.
  " Function change.
  as_headdata-function   = '004'.
  " Article number
  as_headdata-material   = p_matnr.
  as_headdata-matl_type = 'ZLOC'.
  " Reference article number
  as_headdata-ref_matl = lv_ref_art.
  as_headdata-matl_group = p_nmatkl.
  as_headdata-basic_view = abap_true.
  "as_headdata-sales_view = abap_true.
  " Set no application log.
  as_headdata-no_appl_log = abap_true.

  IF lv_taklv IS NOT INITIAL.
    " Set change.
    as_tax-function   = 004.
    as_tax-material   = p_matnr.
    as_tax-tax_ind    = lv_taklv.
    as_tax-depcountry_iso = 'SE'.
    as_tax-depcountry = 'SE'.
    as_tax-tax_type_1 = 'MWST'.
    as_tax-taxclass_1 = lv_taklv.
    APPEND as_tax TO at_tax.

    as_clientdata-material   = p_matnr.
    as_clientdatax-material  = abap_true.
    " Set update flags.
    as_clientdata-function   = 004.
    as_clientdatax-function  = abap_true.
    " Set tax class.
    as_clientdata-tax_class  = lv_taklv.
    as_clientdatax-tax_class = abap_true.
    as_clientdata-countryori = 'SE'.
    as_clientdata-countryori_iso = 'SE'.
    as_clientdatax-countryori = 'SE'.
    as_clientdatax-countryori_iso = 'SE'.

    APPEND as_clientdata TO at_clientdata.
    APPEND as_clientdatax TO at_clientdatax.
  ENDIF.

    IF as_selected_node IS NOT INITIAL.
      as_plantdata-function    = zdom_msgfn_004.
      as_plantdatax-function   = zdom_msgfn_004.
      as_plantdata-material    = av_matnr.
      as_plantdatax-material   = av_matnr.
      as_plantdata-plant       = ac_ref_store.
      as_plantdatax-plant      = ac_ref_store.
      as_plantdata-cc_ph_inv   = get_ref_abcin( ).
      as_plantdatax-cc_ph_inv   = get_ref_abcin( ).
      APPEND as_plantdata TO at_plantdata.
      APPEND as_plantdatax TO at_plantdatax.
    ENDIF.

  DATA: ls_return  TYPE bapireturn1,
        ls_return2 TYPE bapiret2.

  " Call FM to update

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MATERIAL_MAINTAINDATA_RT'
    EXPORTING
      headdata           = as_headdata
    IMPORTING
      return             = ls_return
    TABLES
      clientdata         = at_clientdata
      clientdatax        = at_clientdatax
      plantdata          = at_plantdata
      plantdatax         = at_plantdatax
      taxclassifications = at_tax.
*  " Set return.
  ls_return2 = ls_return.

  IF p_test = abap_false.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
      IMPORTING
        return = ls_return2.
  ELSE.
    " Call rollback.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'
      IMPORTING
        return = rs_return.
  ENDIF.

 

Can you please assist how to update the taxcode/tax classification fully?

entry.title: Supplier confirmation S/4 publice cloud
entry.content:
hello every one,

in the supplier confirmation there is a confirmation types AB, LA, CH etc...

I would like to know about the confirmation type CH, what is it used for or what is the purpose of it?

thanks in advance

Anjan Sinha

entry.title: Re: MDK - how to expose data as simple table on a phone w...
entry.content:
Thank you so much Bill for providing this confirmation about data table and suggestion on object table.

I ll review the options with the object table, but the fact that the fields will be distributed across multiple lines is likely to be a blocker here. still worth a test and get a confirmation though.

I ll raise the request on the link you shared. thank you for that! 

in the meantime, if the data table format is confirmed as mandatory in this context, I ll go with prev & next buttons at the bottom of the screen, and let user choose their own number of max lines.

entry.title: Re: Costs & Revenues getting mapped against separate WBS...
entry.content: Unlike traditional PS projects the Public Cloud Customer Projects does not flexibility in how the WBS are structured, it is hidden for simplicity. You have set everything up correctly. You might have to a custom report to get the reporting you need.

entry.title: Re: Error "Serial number already exists for material" whe...
entry.content:
hello @adrakev ,

Please check the tcode IE02. Enter the equipment id and go to top menu bar. In the "Environment" there is an option to link existing serial number list. Did you check this? Does it work?

Similar option is available in IQ02 also in top menu bar.

Vaibhav

entry.title: Re: Import data from BW Bex query to SAC system
entry.content: Replacing data source for importing Transaction data will allow reuse of the prior mapping; however Master data import jobs does not allow to replace the data source. Is there any way to copy the prior mapping of master data import jobs ? Can you please guide on this ?

entry.title: Delta load in SAP Datasphere replication flow fails
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am currently struggling with a delta load using the 0UC_SALES_STATS_02 extractor in SAP Datasphere Replication Flow configured with delta.

Long story short, we have everything related to the conectivity in place and we have created this RF to extract a full picture of sales statistics in a local table inside SAP Datasphere. We are using the EBW_DQ_SS transaction code to prepare our loads in the delta queue, however due to a very big pool of data(over 1B records), we have to run this job with filter on Posting Date to be just a part of each month (1-20; 21-29/30/31).

We have started the delta init with no data and from there with each slice of data scheduled in EBW_DQ_SS. Everything went smoothly for some cases, however for some particular cases(where is way too much data in one slice), we occur some errors: sometimes can be out-of-memory errors, othertimes can be "closed connection" (internal server error).

We are trying to trace the problem, but there are no hints on what actually is going wrong.

It is to mention that our DP Agent is set with only 8GB of physical memory.

We don't think there is a problem with the configuration of the SDI connection as we have managed to load about 700M records, but we got stuck at some point. 

Experts, please help us, if you have ever occured an error like this, to understand what we are doing wrong. Do we need to raise the resources for the DP agent? Is there any chance that the connection is configured wrong? 

 

Thank you and best regards,

Florin

entry.title: Re: I would appreciate if you please share the challenges on Subsequent activation of Actual Costing
entry.content: Did you already check blogs or KBA  such as Subsequent activation of actual costing & actual cost component split with concurrent change of CCS or 2586176 - Unable to activate actual cost component split retroactively ?

entry.title: Re: MDK - how to expose data as simple table on a phone w...

entry.title: Re: Reimagining digital learning as an integrated part of a Digital Adoption Platform with SAP &&&&
entry.content:
@Franco11 

Hi Franco, 

this announcement means that WalkMe will be the go-to solution for in-app and digital learning use cases. Existing SAP Enable Now customers can still renew their cloud edition licenses until further notice. As stated, the transition timeline will be announced once available.

entry.title: Re: Account created in NWBC not showing up in table T012K
entry.content:
The problem is the starting date of the Bank account.

3362638 - house bank and house bank account ID is not updated 

Symptom

The bank account number is created in the app "manage bank accounts'. House bank and the house bank account ID is assigned in the tab "house bank account connectivity". But the house bank and the house bank account ID is not updated in the table T012K.

Environment

  • SAP S/4HANA Finance
  • SAP S/4HANA
  • SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA Finance
  • SAP Fiori

Reproducing the Issue

  1. Create the bank account number in the app 'manage bank accounts'.
  2. Assign the house bank and house bank account ID in the tab 'house bank account connectivity'.
  3. Check the table T012K and the house bank and house bank account ID is not updated.

Cause

The field 'Valid from' in the 'house bank account connectivity' tab is in the future. 
Resolution

Change the field 'valid from' into a past date .

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - A Guide to MPL Search
entry.content:
Hi Santosh, 

Nice blog, One small correction. The API url should be

 https://{{cpi_tmn_host}}/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogCustomHeaderProperties?$filter=Na... eq 'IDOCNUM' and Value eq '0000000123456789'&$expand=Log&$format=json

remove itspaces/odata. and it worked.

entry.title: Are you familar with the key configure and use key QM processes?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring SAP S/4HANA Quality Management learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will introduce you to the advanced concepts of SAP S/4HANA Quality Management (QM) focusing on the creation and management of basic data, inspection planning, quality notifications, the complete quality inspection lifecycle, and quality management costs. 

Learning objectives
At the end of this learning journey, consultants will be able to:

  1. Create basic data, including setting up sample determination, dynamic modification, master inspection characteristics, and codes.
  2. Develop and enhance comprehensive inspection plans using basic data.
  3. Configure result recording, valuation, and usage decisions within SAP S/4HANA Quality Management.
  4. Configure and process quality notifications across different operational processes, such as procurement, sales, and production, facilitating effective defect recording and cost management.
  5. Record Quality Management costs using the QM order.

Prerequisites

  • Applying SAP S/4HANA Quality Management

Practice your skills in a live SAP environment

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content: Welcome @Abishekh_Sunil and thanks for the introduction! Have you already joined a location group or considered to become an event organizer? You can also read my welcome blog post.

entry.title: Capability Map for Integrated Business Planning
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for capability map (L1-L3) for Integrated Business Planning (IBP).

E2E process map is useful as well. Any input is welcome.

entry.title: Global Benefits - Benefit plan button not working
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently developing a solution for a client in SAP SuccessFactors Global Benefits, but I've encountered an issue. On the Select Benefits screen, the Plan Selection button is not working, preventing me from selecting any plans.

I'm attaching a screenshot below:

Has anyone faced this issue before? Any insights on possible causes or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

EDIT: This only happens if I use the latest Benefits Overview Page, if I use the legacy I can select the plans.

Thank you.

entry.title: MISSING MANDATE REFERENCE
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have identified that the "Mandate Reference" field is populated in the accounting document when it is created through sales integration. However, when the same document is posted directly in Finance, the field remains empty/blank.

This behaviour is highly critical as it prevents the grouping of open items when issuing SEPA Direct Debits.

We encountered this issue during our first SDD run and identified the root cause based on OSS Note 3418697
Please let us know if you need any further details.

Best regards,
Davide

entry.title: Re: Export and Import Feature of SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
@ukinguva Hello, apologies for late response. You can get more skills into your library via AI-Assisted Skills Architecture Creation, on top of what is configured already and you also get a chance to see and decide which one you want to keep in the library. I suggest you to check this blog from the PM on this topic for more clarity. https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/ai-assisted-skills-architecture-creation/ba-p/13711425

Hope this helps!

Regards

Ujjal

entry.title: Can Variant Management be used to switch between List View and Reporting View with the same data?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently working on a Fiori application where I need to present the same underlying data in two different views: a classic List View and a Reporting View (for example, an OverviewPage). My question is:

Is it possible to use Variant Management to switch between these two distinct app views?

So far, I've used Variant Management primarily for storing and restoring filters, columns, or layout settings within a single template. However, my idea is to see if I can leverage it to swap out entire templates (i.e., switching from a List View to a Reporting View) while using the same data source.

If anyone has experience with this scenario or can share insights on whether this is feasible—or if not, what alternative approaches (such as routing or cross-application navigation) might be recommended—I would greatly appreciate your input.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAc...
entry.content:
Hello @William_Yu - Thanks for the response. Here is the sample data that gives an idea of how it looks like.

SOURCE DATA
TIMESTART_DATEEND_DATEEMPLOYEEIDDATASOURCE
2025016/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
2025026/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
2025036/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
.6/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
.6/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
.6/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
2026066/6/20226/18/2025100100UPLOAD
2025012/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
2025022/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
2025032/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
.2/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
.2/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
.2/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD
2026062/21/20256/26/2025100101UPLOAD

I would like to transform this data as below

FINAL DATA
TIMESTART_DATEEND_DATEEMPLOYEEIDDATASOURCECOUNTSALARY
2025016/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC11
2025026/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC11
2025036/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC11
2025046/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC11
2025056/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC11
2025066/6/20226/18/2025100100CALC-HC10.60
2025022/21/20256/26/2025100101CALC-HC10.29
2025032/21/20256/26/2025100101CALC-HC11
2025042/21/20256/26/2025100101CALC-HC11
2025052/21/20256/26/2025100101CALC-HC11
2025062/21/20256/26/2025100101CALC-HC10.87

Can you please advise what do you mean by without variable? Would you be able to give a sample code? I do have a check before calculating COUNT & SALARY measures. But they are not giving correct results.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Re: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent, f...
entry.content:
tbh I don't know much about changing the SAPUI5-Version for BTP deployment. I don't think that you can change the SAPUI5-Version in the manifest.json, at least there is the "minUI5Version" under sap.ui5/dependencies but according to the documentation it is just for information:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/be0cf40f61184b358b5faedaec98b2da

You might need to check if you can set a different version for the BTP launchpad itself, or you need to adjust your app to work with the current version there (1.120.x is the latest long-term version, maybe it is the "newest" one available in this case).

entry.title: Re: Cannot go back to a previous period in Close peridod...
entry.content:
Hi @doanphuongthuy1811 

 

Yes , that is correct.

Please check the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2748224 .

In OnPrem system there is a report RMMMINIT customers can run at there no risk but this isnt available in the Cloud .

 

Unfortunately a workaround is not currently available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Output Management in Purchase Orders: Your Ultimate Guide for Configuration and Troubleshooting
entry.content:
Hi!
How come i don't have acess to the following link:
https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs/blogworkflowpage/blog-id/erp-blog-sap/article-id/56309?prePageCrumb=BlogDashboardPage
"You do not have sufficient privileges for this resource or its parent to perform this action.

Click your browser's Back button to continue."
Best regards, 

Bruno

entry.title: Purchase Requisition ME52N: clear the item deletion status
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm a beginner in PR's management, and I would need help to update (through ABAP code) a PR item that has been set as deleted (Status = Deleted).

What I exactly need is to programmatically remove the item deletion status, that is to say, set the item back to life.

 

Thank you so much for any help in this regard.

JF

entry.title: Re: graduation project : SAP Based Smart Job Tracking System Hello,
entry.content: Hi Zeno, Thanks for your detailed explanation! I see the concern now regarding work tracking and how it could potentially lead to profiling, which is definitely something I want to avoid. I appreciate the recommendation to sync with the DPP Unit. I’ll follow up with them to ensure that everything complies with data privacy regulations and that no personal or indirect data tracking occurs. Thanks again for your help! Best regards, Zeynep

entry.title: Re: Negative Balance Restriction based on future accruals.
Re: MD51 not work for project by MRP area
entry.content:
Hello

Check the information below from note 550844:

3. Can I use the make-to-order production or engineer-to-order planning strategies in MRP areas?
Answer:
The strategies of the make-to-order planning can be used only in the plant MRP area. Therefore, individual customer segments are always in the plant MRP area even if a storage location that refers to a storage location MRP area is assigned in the sales order. You cannot plan individual customer segments in the MRP area.
As of SAP Enhancement Package 3 for SAP ERP 6.0, you can use the business function OPS_PS_CI_1 in the project system to achieve a work breakdown structure (WBS) account assignment on MRP area level. Restriction: Note that to procure project account-assigned requirements from MRP, you can only create purchase requisitions or stock transfer requisitions. For technical reasons, you cannot use stock transfer reservations for the procurement.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: How to bind sap.fe.macros table to data from association?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I hope this time anyone answers my question... 

I'm working on a FE app using Flexible Programming Model and OData V4. I'm trying to call a dialog upon pressing an action button on the object page. The dialog should contain a macros table with the data that comes from the root entity's association. Unfortunately, whatever I try, it doesn't display any data. Here's the working example where my dialog displays the root entity's data (which isn't what I want to achieve):

<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />

 

But I want something like this:
 
<macros:Table id="changeHistoryDialogTable"
metaPath="/BatchRelease/_ChangeHistory/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem"
readOnly="true" />​
 
And it doesn't work. I tried passing contextPath, all possible combinations in the metaPath field - all in vain.
 
My Fiori version is 1.108.37 (S/4HANA On-Prem 2022)
 
I'd appreciate any suggestions.
Regrads,
Mykyta

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi @dylan-drummond,

Thank you as well from my side for this excellent guide! This makes my Mac ever more special to me:-). I am very impressed about its performance and compared to earlier Mac models I am not noticing it heating up as much as well. My MacBook is an M2 Max with 32 GB RAM running on Sequoia. I decided for the installation of the Abap Cloud Developer Trail 2022 SP01 with Docker on the Ubuntu Server VM. Startup time is about 8 min. 

I stumbled onto this guide during the process of installing SAP development software on my Mac. Now I have the Java SapGui 7.8 running being able to access the SAP backend server running in the VM. Currently I am not able to access the server from my Eclipse installation on my Mac but I have a workaround running with an Eclipse installation on a Windows 11 VM. 

The error message raised in Eclipse during the logon process is:
com.sap.adt.communication.exceptions.CommunicationException: partner 'vhcala4hci:3300' not reached;

Caused by: com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (102) JCO_ERROR_COMMUNICATION: Initialization of repository destination A4H_001_supperm_en failed: Connect to SAP gateway failed
connection parameters: TYPE=A DESTINATION=A4H_001_supperm_en ASHOST=vhcala4hci SYSNR=00 PCS=1

I installed additional java SDK’s, generated through the SAPMachine Manager but I believe it is missing the SAPJCo connector. Maybe this is the problem?? In case anybody having also Eclipse installed on the M series Mac not having a problem could confirm that this setup should work would be appreciated. 

Here now a screen print including all described software:

For me the end goal would be to play around with CDS views, RAP and Fiori apps on this server.

Thanks again for the guide and I will keep updating my experiences with it.

Best regards,

Michael
